# Promptise Foundry

> Promptise Foundry is a production-grade Python framework for building agentic AI systems. It is organised as **five pillars**: **Agent** (single-function production agents with auto MCP tool discovery, memory, guardrails, semantic cache, observability), **Reasoning Engine** (`PromptGraph` with 20 composable node types, 18 flags, 7 prebuilt patterns, agent-assembled paths), **MCP Server SDK** (FastAPI-style production servers with auth, middleware, queues, versioning, testing), **Agent Runtime** (the operating system for autonomous agents — triggers, journals, governance, secrets, meta-tools, REST API, distributed coordination), and **Prompt Engineering** (typed blocks, composable strategies, conversation flows, 14 context providers, inspector). Install with `pip install promptise`. Requires Python 3.10+.

The core entry point is `build_agent()` — one async function call produces a production-ready `PromptiseAgent`: connected to MCP servers, with tools auto-discovered from type hints, memory auto-searched before every turn, guardrails scanning input and output, semantic cache deduping similar queries, observability recording every decision, and optional sandboxed code execution. Any LLM via a model string: `"openai:gpt-5-mini"`, `"anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-20250514"`, `"ollama:llama3"`, `"google:gemini-2.0-flash"` — or any LangChain `BaseChatModel`.

Key concepts:
- **MCP-first tool discovery**: Every tool comes from a Model Context Protocol server. Agents auto-discover them — no manual wiring.
- **Reasoning engine**: 20 composable node types (10 standard + 10 reasoning) compile into a `PromptGraph`. 7 prebuilt patterns (`react`, `peoatr`, `research`, `autonomous`, `deliberate`, `debate`, `pipeline`) or agent-assembled at runtime from a node pool.
- **CallerContext**: Per-request user identity (`user_id`, `bearer_token`, `roles`, `scopes`, `metadata`) propagated via asyncio contextvars through cache, guardrails, conversations, observability, and outbound MCP calls.
- **Async-first**: All public APIs are async. Use `asyncio.run()` at the top level.
- **Native, no-fallback**: Native MCP client (no third-party dep). If something fails, it raises — never silently switches.

## Core Agent

- [Building Agents](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/building-agents/): `build_agent()`, `PromptiseAgent`, `ainvoke()`, `astream()`, `chat()`, `shutdown()`.
- [Configuration](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/configuration/): `HTTPServerSpec`, `StdioServerSpec`, model strings, `FallbackChain`.
- [Memory](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/memory/): `InMemoryProvider`, `ChromaProvider`, `Mem0Provider` — auto-searched before each invocation.
- [Conversations](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/conversations/): `InMemoryConversationStore`, `SQLiteConversationStore`, `PostgresConversationStore`, `RedisConversationStore` — session ownership enforced.
- [Guardrails](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/guardrails/): `PromptiseSecurityScanner` with 6 detection heads (prompt injection, PII, credentials, NER, content safety, custom). All models run locally.
- [Semantic Cache](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/cache/): In-memory or Redis backend; per-user / per-session / shared scope; GDPR `purge_user()`; optional encryption at rest.
- [Tool Optimization](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/tool-optimization/): 4 levels (NONE, MINIMAL, STANDARD, SEMANTIC). Semantic mode selects relevant tools per query — 40-70% fewer tokens.
- [Sandbox](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/sandbox/): Docker + seccomp + capability dropping + gVisor. 5 auto-injected tools (execute, read_file, write_file, list_files, install_package).
- [Cross-Agent Delegation](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/cross-agent/): `CrossAgent`, `ask_peer()`, `broadcast()` over HTTP + JWT.
- [Approval](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/approval/): `ApprovalPolicy` + CLI / webhook / auto handlers. Auto classifier with 5-layer decision hierarchy.
- [Events](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/events/): `EventNotifier` with Slack, PagerDuty, webhook, callback sinks.
- [Streaming](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/streaming/): `astream()` with token + tool-call + tool-result events.
- [RAG Foundation](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/rag/): Pluggable loader / chunker / embedder / store pipeline.
- [Adaptive Strategy](https://docs.promptise.com/core/agents/adaptive/): Failure classification and strategy learning over time.
- [Observability](https://docs.promptise.com/core/observability/): 4 levels (OFF, BASIC, STANDARD, FULL). 8 transporters (HTML, JSON, structured log, console, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, webhook, callback).
- [SuperAgent Files](https://docs.promptise.com/core/superagent/): `.superagent` YAML with `${VAR}` resolution and cross-agent cycle detection.
- [CLI](https://docs.promptise.com/core/cli/): `promptise agent`, `promptise validate`, `promptise list-tools`, `promptise run`, `promptise serve`, `promptise runtime`.

## MCP Server SDK

- [Building Servers](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/building-servers/): `MCPServer`, `MCPRouter`, `@server.tool()`, `@server.resource()`, `@server.prompt()` — schema auto-generated from type hints.
- [Authentication](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/auth-security/): `JWTAuth` (HS256), `AsymmetricJWTAuth` (RS256 / ES256), `APIKeyAuth`. LRU token cache. Built-in OAuth2 `TokenEndpointConfig` for dev/test.
- [Guards](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/guards/): `HasRole`, `HasAllRoles`, `RequireAuth`, `RequireClientId`, custom `Guard` protocol.
- [Middleware](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/middleware/): Logging, Timeout, RateLimit (token bucket), CircuitBreaker, Concurrency, PerToolConcurrency, StructuredLogging, Audit (HMAC-chained JSONL), Cache, Prometheus, OTel, Webhook.
- [Caching](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/caching/): `InMemoryCache` (LRU + TTL), `RedisCache`, `@cached` decorator.
- [Job Queue](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/job-queue/): `MCPQueue` with priority, retry + exponential backoff, progress, cancellation. Auto-registered tools: `queue_submit`, `queue_status`, `queue_result`, `queue_cancel`, `queue_list`.
- [Dependency Injection](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/di/): FastAPI-style `Depends()` with generator cleanup.
- [Session State](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/session-state/): Per-client key-value storage across tool calls.
- [Elicitation & Sampling](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/elicitation-sampling/): `Elicitor` (structured mid-call input), `Sampler` (request LLM completions from the client).
- [Streaming & Progress](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/streaming/): `StreamingResult`, `ProgressReporter`.
- [Versioning & Transforms](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/versioning/): `VersionedToolRegistry`, `NamespaceTransform`, `VisibilityTransform`, `TagFilterTransform`.
- [Composition](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/composition/): `server.mount()` for namespace-isolated sub-servers.
- [OpenAPI Import](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/openapi/): `OpenAPIProvider` converts an OpenAPI spec into MCP tools.
- [Exception Handlers](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/exception-handlers/): `ExceptionHandlerRegistry` with MRO matching.
- [Health & Metrics](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/health-metrics/): Kubernetes-native liveness/readiness/startup probes. `MetricsCollector`, `PrometheusMiddleware`, `OTelMiddleware`.
- [Testing](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/testing/): `TestClient` runs the full pipeline (validation → DI → guards → middleware → handler) in-process with no network.
- [Transports](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/transports/): stdio, streamable HTTP, SSE. Configurable CORS. Auth gate at transport level.
- [Dashboard](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/server/dashboard/): `promptise serve --dashboard` — 6-tab terminal UI.
- [MCP Client](https://docs.promptise.com/mcp/client/): `MCPClient` (single server), `MCPMultiClient` (federate N servers), `MCPToolAdapter` (MCP → LangChain `BaseTool`). Native implementation.

## Reasoning Engine (Pillar 2)

- [Overview](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine/): `PromptGraph`, `PromptGraphEngine`, 20 node types, 7 prebuilt patterns, `@node` decorator, `ExecutionEngine`, JSON serialization.
- [Nodes](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine-nodes/): `PromptNode` (blocks, tools, strategy, model override, data flow, guards, pre/post processors), `ToolNode`, `RouterNode`, `GuardNode`, `ParallelNode`, `LoopNode`, `HumanNode`, `TransformNode`, `SubgraphNode`, `AutonomousNode`, `ThinkNode`, `PlanNode`, `ReflectNode`, `CritiqueNode`, `SynthesizeNode`, `ValidateNode`, `ObserveNode`, `JustifyNode`, `RetryNode`, `FanOutNode`.
- [Flags](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine-flags/): 18 `NodeFlag` values — `ENTRY`, `TERMINAL`, `INJECT_TOOLS`, `READONLY`, `REQUIRES_HUMAN`, `CACHEABLE`, `RETRYABLE`, `CRITICAL`, `OBSERVABLE`, `STATEFUL`, `PARALLEL_SAFE`, `SKIP_ON_ERROR`, `VERBOSE`, `LIGHTWEIGHT`, `NO_HISTORY`, `ISOLATED_CONTEXT`, `SUMMARIZE_OUTPUT`, `VALIDATE_OUTPUT`.
- [Patterns](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine-processors/): `build_react_graph`, `build_peoatr_graph`, `build_research_graph`, `build_autonomous_graph`, `build_deliberate_graph`, `build_debate_graph`, `build_pipeline_graph`.
- [Hooks](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine-hooks/): `on_node_start`, `on_node_end`, `on_graph_start`, `on_graph_end`, `on_error`.
- [Skills](https://docs.promptise.com/core/engine-skills/): `SkillRegistry` — path-glob-scoped skill activation.

## Agent Runtime

- [Overview](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/): `AgentRuntime`, `AgentProcess`, `ProcessConfig`, lifecycle states (CREATED → STARTING → RUNNING → SUSPENDED → STOPPING → STOPPED/FAILED).
- [Triggers](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/triggers/): `CronTrigger`, `EventTrigger`, `MessageTrigger`, `WebhookTrigger` (HMAC verified), `FileWatchTrigger` (glob-filtered).
- [Governance](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/governance/): `BudgetConfig` (per-run + daily limits, tool costs), `HealthConfig` (stuck / loop / empty / error-rate detection), `MissionConfig` (LLM-as-judge + programmatic success_check), `SecretsConfig` (TTL, rotation, zero-fill revocation).
- [Journals](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/journals/): `InMemoryJournal`, `FileJournal`, `ReplayEngine`, `RewindEngine` with 5 modes (full, conversation, code, summarize, preview).
- [Hooks](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/hooks/): 14 lifecycle hook points, `once: true`, priority ordering, `ShellHook` for external scripts.
- [Open Mode](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/open-mode/): 14 meta-tools for self-modifying agents (`modify_instructions`, `create_tool`, `connect_mcp_server`, `add_trigger`, `remove_trigger`, `spawn_process`, `list_processes`, `store_memory`, `search_memory`, `forget_memory`, `list_capabilities`, `get_secret`, `check_budget`, `check_mission`). Constraint system: max instruction length, max custom tools, MCP URL whitelist, mandatory sandbox.
- [Inbox](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/inbox/): Live agent conversation — `runtime.ask()`, `runtime.inbox()` for bi-directional messaging with running processes.
- [REST API](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/api/): 37-endpoint HTTP API for lifecycle, messaging, inbox, governance updates, health, logs, distributed coordination. Typed `APIClient` included.
- [Distributed](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/distributed/): `RuntimeCoordinator` with `StaticDiscovery` / `RegistryDiscovery`. Multi-node over HTTP. No etcd/Consul dependency.
- [Manifests](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/manifests/): `.agent` YAML with model, instructions, servers, triggers, world state, memory, journal, open mode, budget, health, mission, secrets.
- [Dashboard](https://docs.promptise.com/runtime/dashboard/): Live terminal UI for process state, invocations, triggers, memory, journal.

## Prompt Engineering

- [Blocks](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/blocks/): 8 block types — `Identity`, `Rules`, `OutputFormat`, `ContextSlot`, `Section`, `Examples`, `Conditional`, `Composite`. Priority-based token budgeting drops lowest-priority first.
- [Strategies](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/strategies/): `chain_of_thought`, `structured_reasoning`, `self_critique`, `plan_and_execute`, `decompose`. Composable via `+`. Perspectives: `Analyst`, `Critic`, `Advisor`, `Creative`, `CustomPerspective`.
- [Flows](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/flows/): `ConversationFlow` with `@phase` decorator, `on_enter`/`on_exit` hooks, depth-limited recursive transitions.
- [Context Providers](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/context/): 14 providers — Tool, Memory, Task, Blackboard, User, Environment, Conversation, Team, Error, Output, Static, Callable, Conditional, World.
- [Builder](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/builder/): `PromptBuilder` fluent API.
- [Chaining](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/chaining/): `chain`, `parallel`, `branch`, `retry`, `fallback`.
- [Guards](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/guards/): `ContentFilterGuard`, `LengthGuard`, `SchemaStrictGuard` (retry on schema fail), `InputValidatorGuard`, `OutputValidatorGuard`.
- [Template Engine](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/template/): SSTI-safe formatter, `{% if %}`/`{% for %}`/`{% include %}`, opt-in `!`cmd`` shell interpolation via `SubprocessShellExecutor` (disabled by default).
- [YAML Loader](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/loader/): `.prompt` files from file, URL, or directory.
- [Registry](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/registry/): SemVer versioning with `@version`, rollback, duplicate detection.
- [Inspector](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/inspector/): `PromptInspector` traces assembly step-by-step — blocks included/excluded, tokens per block, render time, guard results.
- [Testing](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/testing/): `mock_llm`, `mock_context`, `assert_schema`, `assert_contains`, `assert_latency`, `assert_guard_passed`.
- [Suites](https://docs.promptise.com/prompting/suite/): `PromptSuite` groups related prompts with shared defaults.

## API Reference

- [Agent API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/agent/): `build_agent()`, `PromptiseAgent`, `CallerContext`.
- [Server API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/mcp-server/): `MCPServer`, `MCPRouter`, guards, middleware, DI, queue.
- [Client API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/mcp-client/): `MCPClient`, `MCPMultiClient`, `MCPToolAdapter`.
- [Engine API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/engine/): `PromptGraph`, `PromptGraphEngine`, all node types, `NodeFlag`.
- [Runtime API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/runtime/): `AgentRuntime`, `ProcessConfig`, `TriggerConfig`, `BudgetConfig`, `HealthConfig`, `MissionConfig`, `SecretsConfig`, `APIServer`, `APIClient`.
- [Prompts API](https://docs.promptise.com/api/prompts/): `@prompt`, `PromptBuilder`, blocks, strategies, flows, guards.

## Optional

- [Installation Extras](https://docs.promptise.com/getting-started/installation-extras/): `pip install promptise` (core), `pip install "promptise[all]"` (vector memory, ML guardrails, Redis, Docker, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Mem0), `pip install "promptise[dev]"` (contributors).
- [Examples Gallery](https://docs.promptise.com/resources/examples/): 15 runnable scripts across 12 categories — adaptive, approval, hooks, mcp, memory, production, prompts, rag, reasoning, runtime, sandbox, security. All use real LLM calls via `build_agent()` (default model `openai:gpt-5-mini`).
- [Changelog](https://docs.promptise.com/resources/changelog/): Version history.
- [Migration Guide](https://docs.promptise.com/resources/migration/): Upgrading between versions.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/promptise-com/foundry/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Dev setup, testing, submission guidelines.
- [Security Policy](https://github.com/promptise-com/foundry/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting.
- [Source](https://github.com/promptise-com/foundry): Repository.
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/promptise/): Package.
